name: @file-reader/viewer
description: Edoc Viewer — secure encrypted document viewer
author: Edoc Viewer

scripts.pack: npm run clean:release && npm run build && npm run prepare:dist && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run clean:release && npm run build && npm run prepare:dist && electron-builder && npm run trim:release
scripts.dist:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build && npm run prepare:dist && electron-builder --win && npm run trim:release
